message.content:
@startuml
actor PowerUser

participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodUI" as UI
participant ":EnergyConsumptionInPeriodCTRL" as CTRL
participant ":RoomList" as RoomList
participant ":Room" as Room
participant ":Device" as Device
participant ":ReadConfigFile" as ReadConfigFile
participant ":ReadingList" as ReadingList
participant ":Reading" as Reading

PowerUser -> UI : 1 Get Total Metered\nEnergy Consumption
UI --> PowerUser : 2 Show Options: Device,Room,Grid
PowerUser -> UI : 3 Choose Room option
UI -> CTRL : 4 rLs=showRoomListInStr()
CTRL -> RoomList : 5 rLs=showRoomListInStr()
RoomList --> CTRL : 
UI --> PowerUser : 6 Show Room List
PowerUser -> UI : 7 Choose a Room
UI --> PowerUser : 8 Ask for the time interval
PowerUser -> UI : 9 Input the time interval
UI -> CTRL : 10 tMe=getEnergyConsumption\nInPeriod(index, start, end)
CTRL -> RoomList : 11 tMe=getEnergyConsumption\nInPeriod(index, start, end)
RoomList -> Room : 12 tMe = getEnergyConsumption\nInPeriod(start, end)
Room -> Device : 13 i=getDevicesMeteringPeriod()
Device --> Room :
Room -> ReadingList : 14 tMe=getValueOfReadings\nInTimeInterval(start, end)
ReadingList -> Reading : 15 v=returnValueOfReading
Reading --> ReadingList :
ReadingList --> Room :
Room --> RoomList :
RoomList --> CTRL :
CTRL --> UI :
UI --> PowerUser : 16 Show Total Metered Energy\nConsumption in the Room

@enduml
